transform.script: def uids = new ArrayList(); for (h in ctx.payload.unmatched_ends.hits.hits) { uids.add(h._source.start_event_uid)} return uids;

ArrayList recs = new ArrayList(); def starts = ctx.payload.matching.hits.hits; for (h in ctx.payload.unmatched.hits.hits) { def e = h._source; boolean guard = true; int i = 0; while ( guard ) { if ( i < starts.length) { def s = starts[i]._source; if ( e.start_event_uid == s.event_uid) { guard = false; Map r = [ '@timestamp': s.get('@timestamp'), '_id' : s.trace_id, 'realm' : e.realm, 'class' : e.class, 'serviceName' : s.service_name, 'traceID' : s.trace_id, 'parentID' : s.trace_parent_id, 'startTime' : s.get('@timestamp'), 'duration' : e.start_millis - s.start_millis, 'start_time': s.get('@timestamp'), 'end_time' : e.get('@timestamp'), 'start_millis' : s.start_millis, 'end_millis' : e.start_millis, 'end_event_id' : e.event_id, 'start_event_id' : s.event_id ]; recs.add(r) } else { i = i+1 } } else { guard = false } } } return ['_doc': recs];
ArrayList recs = new ArrayList(); for (h in ctx.payload.unmatched_ends.hits.hits) {def e = h._source; e.remove('start_end'); e.matched = true; e._id = h._id; recs.add(e)} return ['_doc': recs];
ArrayList recs = new ArrayList(); for (h in ctx.payload.starts.hits.hits) {def e = h._source; e.put('matched', true); e.put('_id', h._id); recs.add(e)} return ['_doc': recs];
